title: Keanehan di Lorong Indomie
theme: Menemukan keanehan dan misteri kecil di balik rutinitas pekerjaan malam, memicu rasa ingin tahu yang tak terduga di tengah kebosanan.

cover.prompt: Interior view of a convenience store at late hours. Gentle, persistent illumination from overhead lighting creates a subtle glow on aisles stocked with everyday items. A beverage cooler emits a soft, steady hum. The composition features rows of products extending into the distance, with a checkout counter in the midground. The visual style conveys a scene of quiet routine and profound familiarity. Incorporate a soft focus and a slight vintage photographic grain, suggesting a memory or a repeatedly observed setting, with a gentle, ambient feel.
cover.style: Cinematic photography with a lo-fi aesthetic, featuring a subtle vintage film grain, shallow depth of field, and a gently nostalgic feel.

meta.plan_summary: Budi, a minimarket cashier on a night shift, discovers a peculiar, hand-written label on an Indomie pack, sparking an unexpected investigation. Amidst absurd customer interactions and CCTV limitations, he uncovers seemingly personal clues. The mystery culminates in an anti-climactic yet amusing revelation: the 'clues' were merely a new staff's clerical error and a child's doodle. Budi returns to his routine, now with a cynical smile and a new story, having solved his trivial, comical 'case'.
